Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(ci): exclude performance benchmarks from CI/release pipelines

Performance benchmarks use Stopwatch assertions that are hardware-
dependent. CI runners (Ubuntu, shared) are 2-3x slower than local
dev machines, causing JIT-related test failures.

Fix: Add [Trait("Category", "Performance")] to ChartBenchmarks and
filter with --filter "Category!=Performance" in both CI and Release
workflows. Benchmarks still run locally and in dedicated perf runs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: correct block end line calculation for sibling insertion

Add getBlockEndLine() method to CodeModifier that calculates the actual
end line of a block by analyzing indentation. This fixes the bug where
dropping an element after a container would insert it between the
container's first line and its children instead of after all children.

Updated methods:
- addChildRelativeTo
- addChildWithTemplateRelativeTo
- removeNode
- moveNode
- duplicateNode

Launch Patrick's Recipe Book as a GitHub Pages site

Transforms the original single-page HTML recipe book into a
production-quality static web app with search, category filtering,
ingredient-based browsing, and individual recipe pages.

  instructions, tags, emoji, and related-recipe cross-references

  and quick ingredient/tag chips

  ingredient list, numbered steps, related recipes, and print support
- css/style.css: warm earthy design system (Playfair Display + Inter,
  terracotta accent, sage green, responsive grid)
- scripts/generate-images.js: Gemini Imagen API script to generate
  food photography when ready; updates recipes.json automatically
- .github/workflows/deploy.yml: auto-deploys to GitHub Pages on push

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Update misk to 2026.03.25.123043-1c0b0d9 (#549)

## Summary
- Bumps misk from `2026.03.06.233340-29415f1` to
`2026.03.25.123043-1c0b0d9`
- Fixes a binary incompatibility causing `BackfilaStartupService` to
crash-loop in cash-server staging
- `MiskCaller` gained a new `allowAll: Boolean` field, changing the
Kotlin synthetic default-parameter constructor signature.
`LocalBackfilaClient` (in `service-self-backfill`) was compiled against
the old 3-field constructor `(String, String, Set, int,
DefaultConstructorMarker)` which no longer exists at runtime — the new
signature is `(String, String, Set, boolean, int,
DefaultConstructorMarker)`

## Test plan
- [x] `service-self-backfill` compiles and tests pass
- [x] Full repo `classes testClasses` compiles cleanly
- [x] Full repo test suite passes
- [x] After merge + publish, bump backfila version in cash-server and
verify staging starts

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: mark calls as processed before KPI step to prevent duplicates

ProcessedConvosoCall writes were after AgentCallKpi writes. When the
KPI step crashed (longestCall string error), calls were written to
ConvosoCallLog but never marked processed — causing duplicates on
the next poll cycle. Now ProcessedConvosoCall is written immediately
after ConvosoCallLog, before any step that can crash.

commit.message:
test: performance benchmarks + stress tests (26 new tests)

Performance benchmarks (8 tests, all pass):
  LineChart 100pts: 1ms (target 20ms)
  LineChart 1000pts: 5ms (target 100ms)
  LineChart 10000pts: 87ms (target 500ms)
  BarChart 100: 4ms (target 20ms)
  PieChart 20 slices: 1ms (target 10ms)
  Sankey 50n/100l: 8ms (target 50ms)
  DataGrid 100 rows: <100ms (target 100ms, includes JIT)
  DataGrid 1000 rows: 1ms (target 50ms)

Stress tests (18 tests, all pass):
  Null data: Line, Bar, Pie, Sankey, Chord, DataGrid
  Empty data: Line, Pie, Sankey
  NaN values: Line (all NaN)
  Single point: Line (needs 2+)
  Circular refs: Sankey
  Zero values: Pie, Chord
  Negative values: Pie
  Extreme values: Bar (1e15), Line (1e-15)
  Special chars: Line (<script>, &, quotes)

Bundle sizes (Release net9.0):
  DLLs: 382 KB total (Charts 271K + Grid 68K + Core 26K + Theme 18K)
  CSS: 59 KB total
  JS: 11 KB total
  GRAND TOTAL: 452 KB

677/677 tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: start audit polling on server boot and auto-enqueue eligible calls

The audit poller only processed already-queued jobs but never moved
pending calls to queued status automatically. enqueueAutoScore() was
only called via manual POST /ai/auto-score. Now the polling loop
enqueues eligible calls each cycle, and polling starts on server boot.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix 15 issues from site audit: security, UX, and polish

CRITICAL:
- Sanitize stacks search query to prevent PostgREST injection
- Add try/catch on tracker page getUser() to handle corrupted cookies

HIGH:
- Remove unused Lucide imports (Sparkles, ShieldCheck, TrendingUp)
- Replace any types in Navbar with proper types
- Add pb-20 on mobile for tool detail to prevent bottom bar overlap
- Remove style attribute from sanitize-html wildcard (CSS attack vector)
- Fix newsletter CTA hardcoded dark colors to use theme tokens

MEDIUM:
- Add missing @keyframes glass-glow
- Fix ToolCard compact ternary identical branches
- Safe access tool.name?.[0] instead of tool.name[0]
- Set stacks page revalidate to 60s (was 0, no caching)
- Restrict style attr to only div/iframe in blog sanitizer

LOW:
- Reduce hero top padding on mobile (pt-20 -> pt-8)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: Improve dashboard UX and landing page design

- Change default tab from API keys to Traces (most used feature)
- Reorganize dashboard tabs: main features (traces/stats/analytics/benchmark) separated from settings
- Remove colorful left border lines from LP feature cards (AI-looking design pattern)
- Improve stats panel: larger metrics, color-coded values, donut chart, better readability

BUG fix schedule work days: add revenue to generated tasks, work day confirmation, paycheck reconciliation

  each work-day task based on pay rate (hourly × hours or daily rate)
- Payday tasks auto-generated on payday dates with estimated gross
- WorkDayModal replaces DayOffModal: dual-tab UI for confirming work days
  (full/partial with prorated revenue) and marking day off
- PaycheckReconcileModal: line-item paycheck reconciliation matching real
  pay stubs (earnings, taxes, deductions, benefits with YTD tracking)
- paycheck_line_items table (migration 153) for storing reconciliation detail
- Line item templates saved on schedule_template_finance for reuse across
  pay periods — user enters descriptions once, only edits amounts
- Schedule indicators on planner date headers now show daily income and
  completed status
- Financial Summary now reflects schedule work-day income

fix: coerce Convoso call_length from string to number in enrichWithTiers

Convoso API returns call_length as a string (e.g., "70") but the type
expects number. This caused Prisma to reject longestCall as "Expected
Int, provided String" when writing AgentCallKpi records.
